testcase.name: csp-reporting > parseSentryDsn > parses a valid Sentry DSN
csp-reporting > parseSentryDsn > returns null for invalid URL
csp-reporting > parseSentryDsn > returns null for missing public key
csp-reporting > parseSentryDsn > returns null for missing project ID
csp-reporting > buildCspReportUri > builds correct report URI from DSN
csp-reporting > buildCspReportUri > returns null for invalid DSN
csp-reporting > getCspReportUri > returns explicit URI if set
csp-reporting > getCspReportUri > falls back to DSN-generated URI
csp-reporting > getCspReportUri > returns null if neither env var is set
csp-reporting > buildReportToHeader > builds correct Report-To header JSON
csp-reporting > buildReportToHeader > uses CSP_REPORT_GROUP as group name
csp-reporting > buildReportingEndpointsHeader > builds correct Reporting-Endpoints header
proxy.ts 503 path: /__clerk FAPI host decode failure > returns a 503 JSON response when FAPI host cannot be decoded from publishable key
proxy.ts 503 path: /__clerk FAPI host decode failure > does NOT fire captureErrorWithHostnameLimit for the /__clerk proxy path (handled upstream)
proxy.ts 503 paths: clerkConfigMissing for protected routes (Site 2) > returns HTML for browser navigation to /app/dashboard when Clerk config is missing
proxy.ts 503 paths: clerkConfigMissing for protected routes (Site 2) > returns JSON for API/fetch caller to /app/dashboard when Clerk config is missing
proxy.ts 503 paths: clerkConfigMissing for protected routes (Site 2) > fires captureErrorWithHostnameLimit on clerkConfigMissing 503 (not raw captureError)
proxy.ts 503 paths: clerkConfigMissing for protected routes (Site 2) > passes auth/public paths through even when Clerk config is missing (canProceedWithoutClerk)
proxy.ts 503 paths: !selectedMiddleware for protected routes > returns HTML for browser navigation to /app/dashboard when Clerk middleware is null
proxy.ts 503 paths: !selectedMiddleware for protected routes > returns JSON for API/fetch caller to /app/dashboard when Clerk middleware is null
proxy.ts 503 paths: !selectedMiddleware for protected routes > fires captureErrorWithHostnameLimit on !selectedMiddleware 503
proxy.ts 503 paths: !selectedMiddleware for protected routes > passes public/auth paths through even when Clerk middleware is null
proxy.ts 503 paths: staging Clerk middleware throw > returns HTML for browser navigation to /app/dashboard on staging Clerk throw
proxy.ts 503 paths: staging Clerk middleware throw > returns JSON for API/fetch caller on staging Clerk throw
proxy.ts 503 paths: staging Clerk middleware throw > fires captureErrorWithHostnameLimit on staging Clerk throw
/waitlist 503 path > returns HTML for browser navigation to /waitlist when auth is degraded
proxy.ts middleware > scanner probe drop > returns 404 for probe path /some-creator/wp-content/plugins/hellopress/wp_filemanager.php without invoking Clerk
proxy.ts middleware > scanner probe drop > returns 404 for probe path /timwhite/wp-admin/install.php without invoking Clerk
proxy.ts middleware > scanner probe drop > returns 404 for probe path /xmlrpc.php without invoking Clerk
proxy.ts middleware > scanner probe drop > returns 404 for probe path /.env without invoking Clerk
proxy.ts middleware > scanner probe drop > returns 404 for probe path /some/random.php without invoking Clerk
proxy.ts middleware > scanner probe drop > still serves a legitimate profile path that contains no probe markers
proxy.ts middleware > catch-all handle hardening > redirects /login to /signin without touching the audience block
proxy.ts middleware > catch-all handle hardening > redirects /request-access to /start without touching the audience block
proxy.ts middleware > catch-all handle hardening > returns a fast 404 for other reserved catch-all segments
proxy.ts middleware > cookie banner geo-detection > sets jv_cc_required=1 for EU country (Germany)
proxy.ts middleware > cookie banner geo-detection > keeps only pre-consent cookies for consent-required visitors without consent
proxy.ts middleware > cookie banner geo-detection > deletes existing nonessential proxy cookies when consent is missing
proxy.ts middleware > cookie banner geo-detection > sets nonessential proxy cookies after analytics consent is granted
proxy.ts middleware > cookie banner geo-detection > does not set analytics-classified cookies for marketing-only consent
proxy.ts middleware > cookie banner geo-detection > deletes analytics-classified cookies for marketing-only consent
proxy.ts middleware > cookie banner geo-detection > sets jv_cc_required=1 for US California (CCPA)
proxy.ts middleware > cookie banner geo-detection > sets jv_cc_required=0 for US Texas (no state law)
proxy.ts middleware > cookie banner geo-detection > does not re-set cookie when value already matches
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for unauthenticated users > redirects unauthenticated GET /app to /signin
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for unauthenticated users > redirects signed-out Electron app shell requests with an absolute signin location before Clerk dev-browser handling
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for unauthenticated users > redirects unauthenticated GET /app/dashboard to /signin
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for unauthenticated users > keeps unauthenticated legacy earnings deep links behind signin
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for unauthenticated users > keeps unauthenticated app earnings aliases behind signin
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for unauthenticated users > redirects unauthenticated GET /onboarding to /start before rendering
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for unauthenticated users > redirects unauthenticated GET /waitlist to /start
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for unauthenticated users > allows unauthenticated access to public paths
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for unauthenticated users > does not run the audience block lookup for reserved public routes
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for unauthenticated users > runs the audience block lookup for public profile root paths only
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for unauthenticated users > redirects blocked public profile visitors before route handling continues
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for unauthenticated users > normalizes /sign-in to /signin
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for unauthenticated users > normalizes /sign-up to /signup
proxy.ts middleware > private-origin Clerk handling > keeps Clerk middleware enabled for authenticated mobile APIs on localhost
proxy.ts middleware > staging Clerk contract > fails closed on staging auth routes when staging Clerk keys are missing
proxy.ts middleware > staging Clerk contract > renders auth routes on production runtime when Clerk keys are missing
proxy.ts middleware > staging Clerk contract > returns 503 for protected staging routes when staging Clerk keys are missing
proxy.ts middleware > staging Clerk contract > returns 503 (not a signin redirect) when staging Clerk middleware throws on a protected path (JOV-1902)
proxy.ts middleware > staging Clerk contract > falls back to unauthenticated handling when staging Clerk throws on a public path
proxy.ts middleware > staging Clerk contract > falls back to unauthenticated handling when staging Clerk throws on an auth page
proxy.ts middleware > staging Clerk contract > returns 503 (not a signin redirect) when staging Clerk middleware throws on /app
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > lets authenticated central auth route /auth/start reach its handler without user-state redirects
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > lets authenticated central auth route /auth/callback reach its handler without user-state redirects
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > lets authenticated central auth route /app/auth/callback reach its handler without user-state redirects
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > redirects authenticated user on /signin to /app
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > redirects authenticated user on /signup to /app
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > redirects authenticated user with needsWaitlist on /signin to /waitlist
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > redirects authenticated user with needsOnboarding on /signin to /start
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > returns approved invite recipients from /signin to the invite redemption page
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > lets needsOnboarding users redeem waitlist invite links
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > lets waitlisted users redeem waitlist invite links
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > redirects active user away from /waitlist to /app
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > redirects active users from legacy /onboarding to /start
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > redirects authenticated needsOnboarding users from / to /start without bouncing through /app (JOV-2454)
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > redirects authenticated legacy earnings deep links to artist profile pay
proxy.ts middleware > auth redirects for authenticated users > redirects authenticated app earnings aliases to artist profile pay
proxy.ts middleware > circuit breaker (redirect loop prevention) > redirects to /start and increments redirect count
proxy.ts middleware > circuit breaker (redirect loop prevention) > increments redirect count on subsequent redirects
proxy.ts middleware > circuit breaker (redirect loop prevention) > breaks the loop at count >= 3
proxy.ts middleware > circuit breaker (redirect loop prevention) > lets request through when onboarding_complete cookie is set
proxy.ts middleware > circuit breaker (redirect loop prevention) > redirects needsWaitlist user from /pricing to /waitlist and increments count
proxy.ts middleware > circuit breaker (redirect loop prevention) > treats a tampered jovie_redirect_count cookie (NaN) as 0 (defense in depth)
proxy.ts middleware > circuit breaker (redirect loop prevention) > breaks needsWaitlist rewrite loop at count >= 3 (JOV-2161 regression guard)
proxy.ts middleware > rewrite-exempt paths > does NOT rewrite /start for a needsWaitlist user (lets OnboardingShell mount)
proxy.ts middleware > rewrite-exempt paths > does NOT rewrite /start for a needsOnboarding user
proxy.ts middleware > rewrite-exempt paths > does NOT rewrite /onboarding/checkout for a needsWaitlist user
proxy.ts middleware > rewrite-exempt paths > does NOT rewrite /onboarding/checkout for a needsOnboarding user
proxy.ts middleware > bot detection > blocks Meta bots on sensitive API paths
proxy.ts middleware > bot detection > allows normal user agents on sensitive API paths
proxy.ts middleware > bot detection > does not block Meta bots on non-sensitive paths
proxy.ts middleware > banned user handling > rewrites banned user to /unavailable on non-/app paths
proxy.ts middleware > banned user handling > rewrites banned user on marketing pages
proxy.ts middleware > Clerk FAPI proxy (vercel.json) > does not have clerk rewrites — middleware fetch proxy handles this
proxy.ts middleware > Clerk FAPI proxy (vercel.json) > routes staging Clerk proxy traffic to the staging FAPI host
proxy.ts middleware > Clerk FAPI proxy (vercel.json) > handles upstream 3xx redirects via NextResponse.redirect (avoids middleware crash on streamed redirect bodies)
proxy.ts middleware > Clerk FAPI proxy (vercel.json) > rewrites FAPI-relative Location headers to absolute proxy URLs (Apple OAuth form_post redirect)
proxy.ts middleware > Clerk FAPI proxy (vercel.json) > passes through upstream non-redirect 3xx-adjacent responses (e.g. 304) without rewriting Location
proxy.ts middleware > Clerk FAPI proxy (vercel.json) > returns 503 for staging Clerk proxy traffic when staging keys are missing
proxy.ts middleware > meetjovie.com redirect > 301 redirects meetjovie.com to jov.ie
proxy.ts middleware > support.jov.ie redirect > 308 redirects support.jov.ie to jov.ie/support and preserves query params
proxy.ts middleware > support.jov.ie redirect > redirects support.jov.ie investor paths before investor handling runs
proxy.ts middleware > path-based investor portal (proxy investor early returns) > lets investor response links bypass Clerk without stripping token params
proxy.ts middleware > investors.jov.ie legacy subdomain (proxy investor 301 early returns) > 301 redirects investors.jov.ie non-static paths to jov.ie/investor-portal preserving token
proxy.ts middleware > investors.jov.ie legacy subdomain (proxy investor 301 early returns) > passes through _next static assets on investors.jov.ie without redirect (early return)
proxy.ts middleware > investors.jov.ie legacy subdomain (proxy investor 301 early returns) > 301 redirects investors.jov.ie root to jov.ie/investor-portal
proxy composition (critical) > CSP nonce on response > does NOT generate nonce for marketing paths (homepage)
proxy composition (critical) > CSP nonce on response > generates nonce for app paths
proxy composition (critical) > CSP nonce on response > generates nonce for API paths
proxy composition (critical) > CSP nonce on response > generates nonce for desktop auth handoff pages
proxy composition (critical) > CSP nonce on response > generates nonce for the dynamic start route used after desktop auth
proxy composition (critical) > test bypass auth path > resolves test user when bypass is enabled
proxy composition (critical) > test bypass auth path > treats request as unauthenticated when no test user resolved
proxy composition (critical) > x-clerk-publishable-key header > sets header when both publishableKey and secretKey are present
proxy composition (critical) > x-clerk-publishable-key header > does NOT set header when secretKey is missing (staging without CLERK_SECRET_KEY)
proxy composition (critical) > x-clerk-publishable-key header > does NOT set header when publishableKey is missing
proxy composition (critical) > matcher config > exports a config with matcher that excludes /monitoring
proxy composition (critical) > matcher config > exports a config with matcher that excludes static files
proxy debug/test route lockdown > rewrites debug API routes to /404 on preview deployments
proxy debug/test route lockdown > rewrites debug page routes to /404 on production deployments
proxy debug/test route lockdown > allows shell-v1 product screenshots on loopback automation
proxy debug/test route lockdown > blocks shell-v1 product screenshots on public hosts even with test env
proxy debug/test route lockdown > keeps other experiment routes blocked on loopback automation
proxy debug/test route lockdown > allows debug routes during explicit local development
proxy debug/test route lockdown > keeps /demo reachable outside development
Proxy regions contract (RED 43 — investor / Clerk FAPI / audience / degraded) > maskIpForFingerprint and createFingerprintEdge produce stable, masked output
Proxy regions contract (RED 43 — investor / Clerk FAPI / audience / degraded) > investor portal and Clerk FAPI paths short-circuit early (high priority routing)
Proxy regions contract (RED 43 — investor / Clerk FAPI / audience / degraded) > malicious probes return 404 without leaking info (fail-closed security)
Proxy regions contract (RED 43 — investor / Clerk FAPI / audience / degraded) > returns 503 JSON when Clerk config missing on protected path (non-browser)
Proxy regions contract (RED 43 — investor / Clerk FAPI / audience / degraded) > clerkMiddleware mock uses correct (authCallable, req) signature (nit fix)
route-policy (proxy-routing) > public profile candidate classification (bugfix) > returns null for /start, /pricing, /about, /investors (never enter DB block lookup)
route-policy (proxy-routing) > public profile candidate classification (bugfix) > returns null for other reserved APP_ROUTES and system segments
route-policy (proxy-routing) > public profile candidate classification (bugfix) > reserves every single-segment APP_ROUTES value from public-profile lookup
route-policy (proxy-routing) > public profile candidate classification (bugfix) > returns the username for valid single-segment profile-shaped paths
route-policy (proxy-routing) > public profile candidate classification (bugfix) > rejects too-short or invalid usernames
route-policy (proxy-routing) > categorizePath now owns publicProfileCandidate > exposes publicProfileCandidate on the returned category
route-policy (proxy-routing) > rewrite exemptions (owned by route-policy) > exempts known paths
